arts.ttl: Jonathan Tah reveals why Rüdiger is so unpleasant to play against
arts.sum: When I look at Rüdiger and his mind games, I celebrate them, they are unpleasant for all opponents. I know how repugnant it is for a striker to constantly have the feeling that someone is breathing on your neck or saying something in your ear.

arts.sum: Piero Hincapie has only just turned 23 years old but he is already an established Bundesliga player with bags of experience at the highest level.
